items.title: Introducing Claude 4
items.author: www.anthropic.com
items.snippet: Anthropic has been active with major model releases and platform announcements in early 2026. The Claude 4.x family has seen rapid iteration: Claude Opus 4.6 launched on February 5 with improved agentic coding, longer sustained task execution, and better code review capabilities; Claude Sonnet 4.6 followed on February 17 with a 1M token context window in beta and broad capability upgrades across coding, computer use, and long-context reasoning at the same price as Sonnet 4.5 ($3/$15 per million

items.title: Anthropic to launch new 'Claude Mythos' model with advanced reasoning features — SiliconANGLE
items.author: siliconangle.com
items.snippet: Anthropic has had a busy early 2026 with several major model launches. On February 5, Claude Opus 4.6 was released as the company's most capable model at the time, featuring a 1M token context window in beta, top performance on the Finance Agent benchmark, and a 14.5-hour autonomous task completion horizon. Sonnet 4.6 followed on February 17 at the same price as its predecessor, closing the gap with Opus on coding, document comprehension, and office tasks while becoming the new default for most

items.title: Anthropic is having a month | TechCrunch
items.author: techcrunch.com
items.snippet: Anthropic had an exceptionally active March 2026, launching 14+ products and updates according to a TechCrunch roundup titled 'Anthropic is having a month.' Key highlights include an accidental data leak that revealed an unannounced model internally codenamed 'Claude Mythos,' described as a 'step change' in capabilities with significantly improved reasoning, coding, and cybersecurity performance. The leak exposed nearly 3,000 internal files from a public database, including a draft blog post des

items.title: Claude by Anthropic - Release Notes - Releasebot
items.author: releasebot.io
items.snippet: Anthropic has rolled out several significant API updates in early 2026. Claude Sonnet 4.6 is now the latest balanced model, featuring improved agentic search performance, fewer token consumption, and a 1M token context window (no longer in beta — supported at standard pricing). Claude Haiku 3 is being deprecated with retirement on April 19, 2026, and the 1M token context window beta for Claude Sonnet 4.5/4 will be retired on April 30, 2026. The max_tokens cap has been raised to 300k on the Messa
